title: Introducing dart_rl: First Release 🎉
content:
I'm excited to announce the first release of **dart_rl**, a new Dart package that I've been working on!

This is the initial version, and I want to be upfront: it's still a work in progress. I'm putting it out there early because I believe in sharing the journey, not just the polished final product.

## What is dart_rl?

dart_rl is a new package for the Dart ecosystem. While it's in its early stages, I'm actively developing and improving it based on feedback and real-world usage.

## Why Release Early?

I've always believed that shipping early and iterating is better than waiting for perfection. This first release represents a starting point, and I'm looking forward to seeing where it goes with community input and continued development.

## Check It Out

You can find the package on pub.dev:

🔗 **[dart_rl on pub.dev](https://pub.dev/packages/dart_rl)**

Feel free to try it out, share feedback, or contribute! Remember, this is just the beginning - there's much more to come.

Stay tuned for updates as I continue to work on and improve dart_rl!
excerpt: Announcing the first release of dart_rl - a new Dart package that's still in active development.
